compiled_state.title: Write SC5 structural boundary test: sprint SKILL.md manual-pause handshake documented with done/skip/done<id> variants
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## testing_mode: RED

## Task Description
Create tests/skills/test-external-dep-sc5-sprint.sh. The test asserts that sprint SKILL.md contains: (1) a manual-pause handshake section distinguishing manual:awaiting_user-tagged stories, (2) documentation of the three accepted inputs: done, done <story-id>, and skip, (3) the verification_command execution clause, and (4) confirmation-token audit path.

The 'mock input seam' referenced in the story description is the structural documentation of these input variants — the test validates the seam's documented contract. Must fail (RED) until story 9e66-3e5d implements the handshake text.

## Given / When / Then
- Given: plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md exists
- When: the test checks for the SC5 manual-pause handshake documentation
- Then: the test fails (RED) until story 9e66-3e5d adds the handshake text

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] File tests/skills/test-external-dep-sc5-sprint.sh exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/skills/test-external-dep-sc5-sprint.sh
- [ ] Test test_manual_pause_handshake_section_exists asserts the handshake section is in sprint SKILL.md
  Verify: bash tests/skills/test-external-dep-sc5-sprint.sh 2>&1 | grep -q test_manual_pause_handshake_section_exists
- [ ] Test test_handshake_accepts_done_and_skip_inputs asserts done/done<id>/skip variants are documented
  Verify: bash tests/skills/test-external-dep-sc5-sprint.sh 2>&1 | grep -q test_handshake_accepts_done_and_skip_inputs
- [ ] Test test_verification_command_execution_documented asserts verification_command execution clause present
  Verify: bash tests/skills/test-external-dep-sc5-sprint.sh 2>&1 | grep -q test_verification_command_execution_documented
- [ ] Test test_manual_tag_filtered_from_autonomous_batch asserts filter clause for manual:awaiting_user tag
  Verify: bash tests/skills/test-external-dep-sc5-sprint.sh 2>&1 | grep -q test_manual_tag_filtered_from_autonomous_batch
- [ ] Test exits non-zero (RED) when run against current SKILL.md before 9e66-3e5d is implemented
  Verify: bash tests/skills/test-external-dep-sc5-sprint.sh; echo exit:$?
- [ ] .test-index updated with RED marker [test_manual_pause_handshake_section_exists] for plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md
  Verify: grep '\[test_manual_pause_handshake_section_exists\]' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index
- [ ] Test is auto-discovered by tests/skills/run-skill-bash-tests.sh
  Verify: ls $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/skills/test-external-dep-sc5-sprint.sh
